meta.title: Generate Persona API - AI Music Style Profile Creator | PoYo
meta.description: Create reusable music personas from audio tracks with PoYo's Generate Persona API. Save vocal characteristics, musical styles, and personality profiles for consistent AI-generated music.

hero.title: Generate Persona API - AI Music Persona Creator on PoYo
hero.description: Create reusable music personas from existing audio tracks with PoYo's Generate Persona API. Extract and save vocal characteristics, musical styles, and artistic personality for consistent AI-generated music across multiple generations. Perfect for brand voice creation, artist style preservation, and maintaining sonic consistency.

items.title: Voice Profile Extraction
items.description: Extract vocal characteristics from existing audio tracks and save them as reusable personas. Generate Persona API captures timbre, tone, pitch, and vocal texture for future music generations.

items.title: Artist Style Preservation

items.description: Generate personas once and reuse them across unlimited music generations. Each persona includes name, description, and complete audio characteristics for easy management and reference.

items.title: Style Consistency Control
items.description: Ensure consistent musical output across projects by using saved personas. Perfect for creating music series, brand soundtracks, or maintaining artistic identity across multiple tracks.

items.description: Provide custom names and detailed descriptions for each persona. Organize and manage multiple personas for different projects, brands, or artistic styles.

items.title: Brand Voice Creation
items.description: Create unique brand voice personas for consistent audio branding across marketing campaigns, podcasts, and content. Maintain sonic identity across all brand touchpoints.

items.title: Music Series Production
items.description: Generate consistent music series with preserved artist characteristics. Create album tracks, podcast themes, or video series soundtracks with unified artistic identity.

items.title: Content Production Workflows
items.description: Save personas from successful audio content and reuse them for future projects. Streamline video production, film scoring, and multimedia content workflows with consistent audio styles.

items.description: Model and preserve specific artist styles for authorized use cases. Create personas that capture unique musical characteristics for remix projects, covers, or style transfer applications.

items.title: Product Audio Identity
items.description: Establish consistent audio identity for digital products, apps, and services. Create personas that represent your product's sonic brand across notifications, features, and user experiences.

howToUse.title: How to Use Generate Persona API on PoYo
howToUse.description:
1. Get Your API Key: Create a free PoYo account and generate your API key from the dashboard. Get API Key →

2. Generate Music First: Use the Generate Music API to create an audio track, which returns a task_id and audio_id that you'll need for persona creation. Generate Music →

3. Create Persona: Send a POST request to the generate persona endpoint with task_id, audio_id, persona name, and description. View API Docs →

4. Use Persona ID: Receive a persona_id that can be used in future Generate Music API calls to maintain consistent vocal and style characteristics. Use Persona →

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description:
Generate Persona API: $0.005 per persona creation (1 credit) - Create reusable music style profiles

Features Included: Voice profile extraction, style preservation, unlimited persona reuse, webhook callbacks, custom name and description, permanent storage

Enterprise: Volume discounts available for high-volume usage. Priority processing and dedicated support. Contact sales →

items.question: What is a music persona and why would I use it?
items.answer: A music persona is a saved profile containing vocal characteristics, musical style, and artistic personality extracted from an audio track. Use personas to maintain consistency across multiple music generations, create brand voice identities, or preserve specific artist styles for future projects.

items.question: How do I create a persona from my audio?
items.answer: First, generate music using the Generate Music API, which returns a task_id and audio_id. Then call the Generate Persona API with these IDs plus a custom name and description. You'll receive a persona_id that can be used in future music generation requests to replicate the style.

items.question: Can I use personas across different music generations?
items.answer: Yes! Once created, personas can be reused unlimited times across any Generate Music API call by including the persona_id parameter. This ensures consistent vocal characteristics and musical style across all generations using that persona.

items.question: How many personas can I create?
items.answer: There's no limit to the number of personas you can create. Each persona costs 1 credit to generate and is permanently stored in your account. You can create different personas for various projects, brands, or artistic styles.

items.question: What information does a persona contain?
items.answer: A persona contains extracted vocal characteristics (timbre, tone, pitch), musical style preferences, genre attributes, and performance characteristics from the source audio. Each persona includes a custom name and description you provide for easy organization and reference.
